---
title: Vercel KV
description: Cache backed by Vercel KV (powered by Upstash Redis).
icon: Triangle
---

## When to use

Use the Vercel KV adapter for projects deployed on Vercel. Vercel KV is a Redis-compatible store powered by Upstash, accessible via the `@vercel/kv` SDK.

## Installation

```bash
bun add @justwant/cache @vercel/kv
```

## Setup

```ts title="lib/cache.ts"
import { createCache } from "@justwant/cache";
import { vercelKvAdapter } from "@justwant/cache/adapters/vercel-kv";
import { kv } from "@vercel/kv";

export const cache = createCache({
  adapter: vercelKvAdapter({ kv }),
});
```

## Options

```ts
vercelKvAdapter({
  kv: VercelKVClient;  // @vercel/kv client (required)
  keyPrefix?: string;  // Key prefix applied to all entries
})
```

## Environment variables

Set these in your Vercel project dashboard (automatically injected when you connect a KV store):

```bash
KV_REST_API_URL=https://...upstash.io
KV_REST_API_TOKEN=AX...
```
